Main

[Page 2]
MARKET SUMMARY
INDIA
Market sentiment in India remains subdued, with recyclers increasingly concerned
that prevailing price levels are not supported by underlying local market
fundamentals. Despite weak domestic demand and soft steel market conditions, a pronounced
shortage of available recycling candidates continues to underpin pricing across all
vessel segments. Ship recyclers remain active in acquiring tonnage at elevated levels, largely to sustain
yard operations and
